text:
Cutie Beauty (キューティー＝ビューティー, Kyūtī Byūtī) is a Single-Star Cute Hunter. 

Appearance

Cutie is a woman of average height. She has a great amount of hair tied back in a ponytail, an obscenely big head, a funnel nose, and big, protruding ears. Furthermore, she wears heavily applied facial makeup, eyeliner, and lipstick. She wears a polka-dotted one-piece dress and a matching big bow that ties her hair back. 

Personality

Cutie seems to want to come off as modest and humble, but has a pretentious attitude. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 329 

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

On the first round of the 13th Hunter Chairman Election, Cutie Beauty places in 11 th , along with Sanbica Norton. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 On the second round, she shares 8 th place with Sanbica, Teradein Neutral, and Bushidora Ambitious. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 321 The third round she shares 13 th place with Biscuit Krueger and Linne Horsdoeuvre. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 323 The fourth round she is one of the sixteen candidates qualifying for the fifth round and places in 15 th place. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 325 

Cutie makes her debut during a video presentation for the 16 candidates for chairman, presented by Beans. The video details she's recognized as the Head Groupie of Vice Chairman Pariston Hill and aims for a "cute" Hunter Association. Cutie is eliminated in the fifth round of the election for placing in 11 th and not making the top eight. In her "Loser Speech" for the 13th Hunter Chairman Election, she claims that her dream of a "Cute Association" would become a reality through her respected colleague Pariston Hill. 

Abilities & Powers

Cutie has all the benefits granted by her status as a Hunter. She is a competent Hunter, having received a star, for achieving some extraordinary accomplishment in a field. 

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, Cutie Beauty is capable of using Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60
